title: 🚀 v2.0.0: File Watcher — Monitor directories for changes: snapshots, diffs, glob filt...
content:
Monitor directories for changes: snapshots, diffs, glob filtering, event detection

🆕 v2.0.0 features:
• Advanced CLI with 8+ subcommands
• JSON output for automation
• Built-in self-tests (CI-ready)
• Zero dependencies (Python stdlib)
• Cross-platform (Windows/macOS/Linux)

Free + MIT. Live on ClawHub: https://clawhub.ai/skills/skills/file-watcher
GitHub: https://github.com/itsPremkumar/file-watcher
